markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and explore new monitoring tools.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Publishing Unblocked:** A new review process enables publishing 30+ articles this week. JP will review only data annotation (DA) content to ensure accuracy; general SEO articles will publish directly.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [**New Monitoring Tools Introduced:** GrowthX demoed LLM sentiment tracking and SIFT, a LinkedIn sourcing tool for high-touch recruitment of professional experts.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [**Reddit Strategy Shift:** The focus will shift from direct recruitment to brand perception management. The team will explore engaging in threads to counter negative narratives, using the successful "DA a scam" FAQ ad as a model.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [**Measurement Challenge:** Quantifying the ROI of brand-focused activities (LLM sentiment, Reddit engagement) is difficult. The team will use indirect signals (e.g., surveys, unattributed brand traffic) to build conviction.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Review Process

  - [**Problem:** The initial review process for DA-specific articles was a bottleneck due to factual inaccuracies ("hallucinations") from the AI agent.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new, streamlined review process was implemented to accelerate publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [**DA-Specific Content:** JP will review for accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
      - [**General SEO Content:** Publishes directly to the CMS without manual review.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [**Goal:** Publish 30+ articles by EOW. The long-term target is 30 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)

### Reddit Monitoring & Strategy

  - [**Context:** Reddit is a key source of brand perception, but past direct engagement was limited by bandwidth and difficulty measuring ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [**New Approach:** Shift from direct recruitment to brand perception management.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
      - [**Goal:** Counter negative narratives (e.g., "DA a scam") and shape public opinion.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
      - [**Method:** Monitor relevant threads and engage with comments to influence the conversation.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [**Measurement Challenge:** Quantifying ROI is difficult.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
      - [**Proposed Solution:** Use indirect signals to build conviction.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
          - [**Surveys:** Ask new workers how they heard about DA.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
          - [**Unattributed Brand Traffic:** Analyze Search Console for generic searches (e.g., "data annotation") that lead to the site.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)

### LLM Sentiment Monitoring

  - [**Tool:** GrowthX introduced a tool that tracks ChatGPT responses to specific prompts about DA.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [**Purpose:** Provide directional data on how LLMs perceive the brand.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
      - [**Example Prompts:** "Who pays more?" or "Which has better work-life balance?"](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [**Measurement Challenge:** Direct attribution is impossible (LLM responses don't link).](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Use this as a directional signal, not a primary metric.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
      - [**Refinement:** Segment monitoring for different worker types (generalists vs. professional experts) to understand their distinct concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)

### SIFT Tool for LinkedIn Sourcing

  - [**Tool:** GrowthX demoed SIFT, a tool for monitoring LinkedIn activity of target accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
  - [**Use Case:** High-touch recruitment of professional experts.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Monitor key ML researchers or engineers → Identify relevant posts → Initiate 1-on-1 outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [**Access:** Jason Gong will invite Nancy and Mason to the tool.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
      - [Publish 30+ articles by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
      - [Invite Nancy and Mason to the SIFT tool.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [**Surge AI:**](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
      - [Discuss the new Reddit strategy internally and provide feedback to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
      - [Explore using surveys to track how new workers discover DA.](https://fathom.video/share/HrNGRoZsT44s78b8uAMYzVSeVWTiRZsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
